query:
INSERT INTO sdks (name, engine, version, description, downloadUrl, documentationUrl, fileSize, releaseDate) VALUES
('Reblium SDK for Blender', 'Blender', '1.0.0 (Coming Soon)', 'Official Reblium SDK for Blender 3D. Create and customize avatars directly in Blender with full integration support.', '', '', NULL, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY));
